description: Advanced MTG Manabase Analyzer using Frank Karsten mathematics, Monte Carlo simulation, and Bellman equation for optimal mulligan decisions

directoryTree.purpose: Root directory containing project configuration, documentation, and source code

analyzer.purpose: Core analyzer page components including tabs and deck analysis UI

services.purpose: Business logic and API services - Core mathematical engine

keyFiles.name: manaCalculator.ts
keyFiles.purpose: Frank Karsten hypergeometric probability calculations with tempo-aware analysis

keyFiles.name: advancedMaths.ts
keyFiles.purpose: Advanced mathematical engine with caching, Monte Carlo, and multivariate analysis

keyFiles.name: mulliganSimulator.ts
keyFiles.purpose: Monte Carlo + Dynamic Programming mulligan simulator using Bellman equation

keyFiles.name: deckAnalyzer.ts
keyFiles.purpose: Main deck analysis orchestrator with Scryfall integration

keyFiles.name: landService.ts
keyFiles.purpose: Land detection, ETB analysis, and tempo calculations

hooks.purpose: Custom React hooks for state and calculations

slices.purpose: Redux Toolkit slices for state management

utils.purpose: Utility functions for land detection and calculations

lib.purpose: Custom libraries for privacy and validation

frankKarsten.formula: P(X >= k) = sum(C(K,i) * C(N-K,n-i) / C(N,n)) for i = k to min(n,K)

tempoAwareCalculations.purpose: Account for ETB tapped lands in probability calculations

Some hooks have complex dependency arrays

Improve error handling in deck parsing

supabase.status: Optional - not required for core functionality

issues: lastmod dates stale on 7 of 9 URLs (all 2026-04-06 except / and /library)

issues: buildCommand does NOT invoke build:prerender — dist/ ships only / (no per-route HTML)

No Person schema for Guillaume Bordes linking to GitHub

externalCalls.fonts: Google Fonts + jsdelivr (CDN, no user data)

No citations/footnotes linking specific claims to Karsten articles
No credentials or tournament history for Guillaume Bordes
No 'expert reviewed by' signal (a known MTG pro endorsing would be massive)

criticalGaps: PRERENDER_NOT_WIRED: vercel.json uses 'npm run build' (plain Vite SPA) instead of 'npm run build:prerender'. Result: crawlers without JS see only the default index.html meta tags — per-route titles, descriptions, and JSON-LD never reach Googlebot, PerplexityBot, etc. This is the #1 SEO blocker.
LIBRARY_NOT_IN_PRERENDER: Even when prerender runs, /library is missing from ROUTES in scripts/prerender.mjs:23-31. The newest and biggest content pillar won't be indexed by static HTML.
NO_TWITTER_CREATOR: index.html has twitter:card but no twitter:site or twitter:creator — kills attribution on RTs from @fireshoes (the LAUNCH.md priority #1 tactic).
ANALYZER_NO_JSONLD: The highest-conversion page has no structured data. Should have SoftwareApplication + BreadcrumbList.
NO_BREADCRUMBLIST: Sub-pages (/guide, /mathematics, /land-glossary, /library) have no BreadcrumbList — weakens site hierarchy signal.
SITEMAP_STALE: 7 of 9 sitemap URLs have lastmod=2026-04-06 even though pages have been modified since. Googlebot deprioritizes stale sitemaps.
NO_HOWTO_SCHEMA: /guide is a FAQPage but the core content is step-by-step — HowTo schema would rank better for 'how to build mtg mana base' queries.
OG_IMAGE_ONE_SIZE: Only og-image-v3.jpg (1200x630) exists. Twitter Summary Large Image works, but no square (1080x1080) or vertical (1080x1350) variants for LinkedIn/Discord/iMessage previews.
NO_AUTHOR_BYLINE: /mathematics and /land-glossary have JSON-LD author=Guillaume Bordes but no visible byline. Missed E-E-A-T signal.
NO_LAST_UPDATED: No visible 'Last updated YYYY-MM-DD' on any page. AI engines (Perplexity especially) prefer fresh content.

ROBOTS_TXT_NO_AI_RULES: Default 'User-agent: *' covers all crawlers but explicit rules for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended (opt-out trap) are best practice for trust signaling. ManaTuner's open-source + privacy-first positioning benefits from explicitly ALLOWING AI bots.

aeoGoldmines: /public/llms-full.txt — already structured for AI ingestion, 8.2KB, well-formatted
/src/pages/MathematicsPage.tsx — 981 lines, hypergeometric + Bellman + Karsten explained in plain English. Perfect AI citation fodder.
/src/pages/LandGlossaryPage.tsx — 587 lines, 12 ranked land categories with pros/cons. Perfect for 'what is a fetchland' type queries.
/src/pages/ReferenceArticlesPage.tsx — 443 lines, /library with 35+ articles curated by authority. Signals topical expertise.
/public/llms.txt — 4.2KB, concise AI briefing with FAQ, key features, pages map
README.md — Features table + Karsten tables + tech stack, well-structured for GitHub indexing

context-manager.lastActionSummary: Comprehensive SEO/AEO audit cartography for marketing-writer handoff. Mapped all SEO infrastructure (index.html, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, llms.txt/llms-full.txt, manifest.json, vercel.json, vite.config.ts), per-page JSON-LD structured data, H1/meta titles/descriptions, E-E-A-T signals, and identified 11 critical gaps (prerender not wired, /library missing from prerender, no twitter:creator, analyzer missing JSON-LD, etc.).
